challenge.title: Korak 7
challenge.description:
Poslednji element koji se dodaje svakom od button elemenata su atributi id. Oni će se koristiti za povezivanje button elemenata sa njihovim odgovarajućim panelima sadržaja.

Prvi button element treba da ima id od "tab-earth", drugi treba da ima id od "tab-saturn", a treći treba da ima id od "tab-mars".

challengeFiles.name: index
challengeFiles.contents: Planets

challengeFiles.name: styles

tests.text: Your first button element should have an id attribute.
Your first button element should have an id attribute set to "tab-earth".
Your second button element should have an id attribute.
Your second button element should have an id attribute set to "tab-saturn".
Your third button element should have an id attribute.
Your third button element should have an id attribute set to "tab-mars".

challengeFiles.name: index
challengeFiles.contents:
Planets

Earth is our home planet, known for its abundant water, diverse ecosystems, and life-supporting atmosphere. It's the only planet in the solar system known to harbor life.

Saturn is famous for its beautiful and extensive ring system made of ice and rock particles. It's a gas giant with dozens of moons orbiting it.

Mars, the red planet, is a rocky world with the tallest volcano and deepest canyon in the solar system. It's a key focus for exploration in the search for past or present life.
